caption: Documento de venta
select_query: SELECT v.sys_pk, DATE_FORMAT(v.fecha,'%Y-%m-%d') fecha, v.referencia, CONCAT(d.const,'-',c.nombre) doc FROM venta v INNER JOIN cliente c ON v.icliente = c.sys_pk INNER JOIN cdocumentos d ON v.documento = d.id WHERE v.referencia LIKE CONCAT('%',@search,'%')
